message:
refactor(overprompting): rewrite 3D constraint visualization with enhanced shader system

Complete rewrite of the overprompting visualization component with advanced
WebGL shader pipeline and improved interactive capabilities:

Shader infrastructure:
- Add GLITCH_SHADER with custom vertex/fragment programs for distortion effects
- Introduce maath geometry integration for rounded box primitives
- Replace simple particle cloud with more sophisticated visual metaphors

Component architecture:
- Refactor imports to use extended Three.js primitives (MeshTransmissionMaterial,
  Trail, CameraControls, Environment, Grid)
- Extract shared utilities and shader definitions to module scope
- Replace useCallback with cleaner useLayoutEffect patterns where appropriate
- Add new icon imports (Layers, Microscope, LayoutTemplate) for enhanced UI

Visual improvements:
- More sophisticated constraint impact visualization
- Better HUD label system integration
- Improved animation transitions with AnimatePresence

Also adds supporting global CSS styles for the enhanced visualization components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
